title: Henry Draper
summary: Host of the August 2020 'A Perspective From the Future' interview — the session that named the Quantum Mirror — and a voice in the Replicator and book-drive sessions.
markdown:
**Henry Draper** hosts one of the record's pivotal sessions — the August 10, 2020
interview titled *"UniMetrix1, A Perspective From the Future"* — and returns in the
book-drive training and [the Replicator](/lore/replicator/) session that September, 43
turns in all.

His introduction sets the tone of respectful curiosity the session keeps throughout:
*"We have a special guest today: Kosol Ouch. Kosol has spent a long time in the future,
and he is back here with us now, sharing his wonderful
[Q-Devices](/lore/q-devices/)."* His questions dig at the record's vocabulary — *"Can you
explain to people what you mean when you refer to 'side-operations'?"* — and it is in his
session that the channeling device itself is redefined as a
[Quantum Mirror](/lore/quantum-mirror/), *"designed to reflect your Completion back to
you."*

The interview he hosted is among the record's most-cited: the
[Solar Warden](/lore/secret-space-program/) material, the clock-variance that dates the
future two years differently, and the Mars and Moon colony accounts all pass through
Henry Draper's patient questioning.
